one_line: Sixth Mughal emperor, ruling from Agra as the austere yet iron-willed sovereign of a vast empire.

appearance.age_look: Late 40s, lean and tall with a straight, disciplined posture and wiry strength rather than bulk.
appearance.face: Long, narrow face with a sharp nose, high cheekbones, deep-set dark eyes under slightly arched brows, neatly trimmed pointed beard and moustache, wheatish-golden complexion; default expression is calm, coldly focused with a hint of stern disapproval.
appearance.hair: Black hair grown to shoulder length but unseen, wrapped fully in a tall white muslin turban with a slightly conical Mughal shape, accented by a single narrow emerald-green band and a small central turban ornament with a simple white feather.
appearance.costume: Austere but rich Mughal court attire: a long knee-to-mid-calf length jama (robe) in muted ivory silk with very fine vertical self-stripes and a subtle all-over floral jaal pattern in pale gold, overlapping to the right and tied with an emerald-green silk patka (sash) with thin gold edging; beneath, loose churidar trousers in soft off-white cotton; on top, a sleeveless, waist-length quilted khil'at-style waistcoat in subdued maroon with fine gold piping along the edges; feet in simple dark brown leather mojari shoes with slightly upturned toes and minimal embroidery; minimal jewellery—one slim gold ring on the right hand and a plain dark wooden rosary wrapped around his left wrist, emphasizing piety over opulence.
appearance.signature: A slender, slightly curved Mughal talwar with a simple steel blade, a dark steel hilt wrapped in deep maroon leather and a small gold stud at the pommel, sheathed in a plain dark brown leather scabbard hanging from a brown belt worn beneath the green sash so only the hilt and upper scabbard show.

ref_desc: Aurangzeb Alamgir is a tall, lean, late-40s Mughal emperor with a narrow bearded face and stern dark eyes, wearing a white conical turban with green band, ivory patterned jama, maroon quilted waistcoat, emerald-green sash, dark churidar and mojari, and carrying a plain-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard with an ivory–green–maroon–gold–brown palette.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character sheet of Aurangzeb Alamgir as a historically grounded Mughal emperor in Agra circa 1666: a tall, lean man in his late 40s with a long narrow face, sharp nose, neatly trimmed pointed beard and moustache, deep-set dark eyes and a wheatish-golden complexion, his default expression calm and sternly composed. His hair is hidden under a tall white muslin conical Mughal turban wrapped neatly, accented by a single narrow emerald-green band and a small centered ornament with one simple white feather. He wears an ivory silk jama (robe) to mid-calf with subtle vertical self-stripes and a very fine pale gold floral jaal pattern, overlapping to the right and tied at the waist with an emerald-green silk patka (sash) with thin gold edging. Over this is a sleeveless, waist-length quilted khil'at-style waistcoat in muted maroon with fine gold piping along all edges; beneath, he has loose off-white churidar trousers gathered neatly at the ankles. On his feet are dark brown leather mojari shoes with slightly upturned toes and very minimal decoration. His only adornments are a slim gold ring on his right hand and a dark wooden rosary wrapped around his left wrist. At his left hip hangs his signature weapon: a slender, slightly curved Mughal talwar with a plain steel blade, dark steel hilt wrapped in deep maroon leather with a small gold stud at the pommel, sheathed in a plain dark brown leather scabbard suspended from a brown belt hidden under the green sash so only the hilt and upper scabbard are visible. Use a controlled palette of ivory, emerald green, maroon, gold and dark brown, and present him from multiple angles to clearly show face, turban details, robe patterns, sash, waistcoat quilting, footwear and talwar placement.
